name: Agendamentos
format:
<style>
:root {

.ir-shell, .ir-shell * { box-sizing: border-box !important; }

}
.ir-topbar {

}
.ir-brand, .ir-system, .ir-brand-mark, .ir-online {

}
.ir-brand { gap: 12px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; }
.ir-brand-mark { gap: 10px; }
.ir-brand svg { width: 21px; height: 21px; }

}
.ir-nav { display: grid; gap: 3px; }
.ir-nav-button {

.ir-next-card {

}
.ir-title { margin: 0; color: #071614 !important; font-size: 31px; font-weight: 850; line-height: 1.05; }
.ir-subtitle { margin: 8px 0 0; color: var(--ir-muted) !important; font-size: 14px; }
.ir-primary-button, .ir-secondary-button, .ir-icon-button, .ir-danger-button {

}
.ir-primary-button {

}
.ir-primary-button:hover { background: var(--ir-green-dark); }
.ir-primary-button:disabled, .ir-secondary-button:disabled, .ir-icon-button:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;

}
.ir-primary-button svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
.ir-stats {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;

}
.ir-stat {

  padding: 17px 18px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ir-line);
  border-radius: 12px;

}
.ir-stat-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 7px; color: var(--ir-muted); font-size: 12px; }
.ir-stat-value { color: #071614; font-size: 23px; font-weight: 850; line-height: 1; }
.ir-stat-value small { margin-left: 5px; color: #858d8f; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; }
.ir-stat-value .ir-live-dot { display: inline-block; width: 9px; height: 9px; margin-right: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: #24b985; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #e2f7ef; vertical-align: 3px; }

}

}
.ir-search svg {

  width: 17px;
  height: 17px;

}
.ir-search input {
  width: 100%;

}
.ir-segmented button.is-active { background: #071a18; color: #fff; }
.ir-secondary-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  height: 38px;

.ir-feedback.is-error { border: 1px solid #ffd1d1; background: #fff0f0; color: #c92f2f; }

.ir-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; table-layout: fixed; }

.ir-table th:first-child { border-radius: 12px 0 0; }
.ir-table th:last-child { border-radius: 0 12px 0 0; }
.ir-table td {

  color: #101b19;

.ir-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: 0; }
.ir-table tr.is-watering td { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f1fbf7, #fff); }
.ir-time { display: block; color: #071614; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 850; }
.ir-time-note { display: block; margin-top: 3px; color: #8a9293; font-size: 10px; }
.ir-time-note.is-live { color: #16a472; font-weight: 800; }
.ir-section { display: flex; min-width: 0; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }

}
.ir-section-icon svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; }
.ir-section-copy { min-width: 0; }
.ir-section-copy strong { display: block; overflow: hidden; color: #101b19; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.15; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

.ir-days { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; }
.ir-day {

}
.ir-day.is-active { background: var(--ir-green); color: #fff; }
.ir-every-day { color: #687173; font-size: 12px; }
.ir-status {

  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;

  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 850;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.ir-status::before { content: ""; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; opacity: .85; }
.ir-status-on { background: #e2f7ef; color: #0a9569; }
.ir-status-off { background: #f0f2f2; color: #858d8f; }
.ir-status-watering { background: #e2f7ef; color: #099b6c; }
.ir-sr-only {
  position: absolute !important;
  width: 1px !important;
  height: 1px !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0) !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
}
.ir-row-actions { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; }
.ir-danger-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  height: 34px;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0 11px;
  background: #ffe9e9;
  color: #e33a3a;
  font-size: 11px;
}
.ir-icon-button {
  display: grid;
  width: 34px;
  height: 34px;
  place-items: center;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #f1f4f4;
  color: #14211f;
}
.ir-icon-button svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
.ir-switch { position: relative; display: inline-flex; width: 37px; height: 22px; flex: 0 0 auto; }
.ir-switch input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }
.ir-switch-slider { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: #dce1e1; cursor: pointer; transition: .15s ease; }
.ir-switch-slider::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 3px;
  left: 3px;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, .2);
  transition: .15s ease;
}
.ir-switch input:checked + .ir-switch-slider { background: var(--ir-green); }
.ir-switch input:checked + .ir-switch-slider::before { transform: translateX(15px); }
.ir-action-menu {

  background: #fff;

}
.ir-action-menu button {
  display: flex;
  height: 34px;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;

  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 0 9px;
  background: transparent;
  color: #172320;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 750;
  text-align: left;
}
.ir-action-menu button:hover { background: #f1f5f4; }
.ir-action-menu button.is-danger { color: #dc3636; }
.ir-empty {

  border: 1px dashed #cfd6d5;
  border-radius: 13px;
  background: #fff;
  text-align: center;
}
.ir-empty-icon { color: var(--ir-green); }
.ir-empty-icon svg { width: 38px; height: 38px; }
.ir-loading-spinner {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  color: var(--ir-green);
  animation: ir-spin .8s linear infinite;
}
.ir-loading-spinner circle {

}
.ir-loading-spinner path {

}
@keyframes ir-spin {

}
.ir-empty h2 { margin: 12px 0 0; font-size: 18px; }
.ir-empty p { margin: 7px 0 0; color: var(--ir-muted); font-size: 13px; }
.ir-modal-backdrop {

  place-items: center;

.ir-modal {

.ir-modal-text { margin: 8px 0 20px; color: var(--ir-muted) !important; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; }
.ir-modal-warning {

  border: 1px solid #ffc9a8;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #fff4ec;
  color: #b45309;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.4;
}
.ir-edit-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 15px; }
.ir-field label { display: block; margin-bottom: 7px; color: #26312f; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; }
.ir-field input, .ir-field select {

  height: 44px;
  border: 1px solid #d4dada;
  border-radius: 9px;
  padding: 0 12px;

  color: var(--ir-ink);

}
.ir-field input:focus, .ir-field select:focus { border-color: var(--ir-green); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(17, 135, 125, .1); }
.ir-field-wide { grid-column: 1 / -1; }

  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 9px;
}
.ir-time-field-head label { margin-bottom: 0; }
.ir-time-limit { color: var(--ir-muted); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; }

.ir-time-remove-button:hover { background: #ffecec; color: #d43f3f; }

.ir-add-time-button {
  display: inline-flex;

  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 7px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(17, 135, 125, .28);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0 14px;
  background: var(--ir-green-soft);
  color: var(--ir-green);
  cursor: pointer;
  font: inherit;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 900;
}
.ir-add-time-button:hover { border-color: var(--ir-green); background: var(--ir-green); color: #fff; }
.ir-add-time-button:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: .45; }
.ir-weekdays { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; }
.ir-weekday {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ir-line);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  background: #f8faf9;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 750;
}
.ir-weekday input { width: auto; height: auto; margin: 0; accent-color: var(--ir-green); }
.ir-edit-switch {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 20px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ir-line);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  background: #f7faf9;
}
.ir-edit-switch strong { display: block; font-size: 13px; }
.ir-edit-switch span { display: block; margin-top: 3px; color: var(--ir-muted); font-size: 11px; }
.ir-modal-actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 9px; margin-top: 22px; }
.ir-modal-actions .ir-secondary-button { margin-left: 0; }
.ir-modal-actions .ir-danger-button { height: 38px; }

@media (max-width: 1050px) {
  .ir-content { padding-right: 24px; padding-left: 24px; }
  .ir-stats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); }
  .ir-table th, .ir-table td { padding-right: 9px; padding-left: 9px; }
}
@media (max-width: 820px) {
  .ir-layout { min-height: calc(100vh - 60px); }
  .ir-mobile-backdrop {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 60px 0 0;
    z-index: 900;
    display: block;
    background: rgba(5, 24, 22, .42);
  }
  .ir-sidebar {
    position: fixed;
    top: 60px;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    z-index: 901;
    display: flex;
    max-width: min(82vw, 280px);
    transform: translateX(-105%);
    transition: transform .2s ease;
    box-shadow: 18px 0 36px rgba(7, 26, 24, .22);
  }
  .ir-sidebar.is-mobile-open { transform: translateX(0); }
  .ir-content { padding: 24px 18px 38px; }
  .ir-heading { align-items: flex-start; }
  .ir-toolbar { flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .ir-search { width: 100%; flex-basis: 100%; }
  .ir-search { width: 100% !important; }
  .ir-secondary-button { margin-left: 0; }
  .ir-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }
  .ir-table { min-width: 850px; }
}
@media (max-width: 560px) {
  .ir-topbar { height: 56px; padding: 0 14px; }
  .ir-mobile-backdrop { inset: 56px 0 0; }
  .ir-sidebar { top: 56px; }
  .ir-brand { gap: 9px; }
  .ir-system { gap: 8px; }
  .ir-online { padding: 6px 8px; }
  .ir-avatar { display: none; }
  .ir-content { padding: 22px 14px 34px; }
  .ir-heading { display: block; }
  .ir-title { font-size: 27px; }
  .ir-heading .ir-primary-button { width: 100%; margin-top: 18px; }
  .ir-stats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 9px; margin-top: 20px; }
  .ir-stat { min-height: 76px; padding: 14px; }
  .ir-stat-value { font-size: 20px; }
  .ir-segmented { width: 100%; }
  .ir-segmented button { flex: 1; padding: 0 7px; }
  .ir-secondary-button { width: 100%; }
  .ir-table-wrap { overflow: visible; border: 0; background: transparent; }
  .ir-table { min-width: 0; }
  .ir-table thead { display: none; }
  .ir-table, .ir-table tbody, .ir-table tr, .ir-table td { display: block; width: 100%; }
  .ir-table tr { margin-bottom: 10px; overflow: visible; border: 1px solid var(--ir-line); border-radius: 12px; background: #fff; }
  .ir-table td { display: flex; height: auto; min-height: 50px; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 15px; padding: 10px 13px; border-bottom: 1px solid #edf0f0; text-align: right; }
  .ir-table tr.is-watering td { background: #f5fcf9; }
  .ir-table td::before { content: attr(data-label); color: #8a9293; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .ir-table td:nth-child(3) { align-items: flex-start; }
  .ir-table td:last-child { border-bottom: 0; }
  .ir-row-actions { justify-content: flex-end; }
  .ir-action-menu { right: 0; }
  .ir-edit-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .ir-field-wide { grid-column: auto; }
  .ir-edit-times { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .ir-modal { padding: 20px 16px; }
  .ir-modal-actions { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .ir-modal-actions button { width: 100%; }
}
</style>

<section class="ir-shell">
  <header class="ir-topbar">
    <div class="ir-brand">
      <button type="button" class="ir-menu-button" aria-label="Abrir menu" ng-click="toggleMobileMenu($event)">
        <svg class="ir-menu-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 6h16M4 12h16M4 18h16"/></svg>
      </button>
      <span class="ir-brand-mark">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3s5 6.1 5 11a5 5 0 0 1-10 0c0-4.9 5-11 5-11Z"/></svg>
        <span>Irriga</span>
      </span>
    </div>
    <div class="ir-system">
      <div class="ir-online" ng-class="systemStatusClass()" title="{{ systemStatusTitle() }}"><span class="ir-online-dot"></span>{{ systemStatusLabel() }}</div>
      <span class="ir-avatar">IR</span>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="ir-layout">
    <div class="ir-mobile-backdrop" ng-if="mobile_menu_open" ng-click="closeMobileMenu()"></div>
    <aside class="ir-sidebar" ng-class="{'is-mobile-open': mobile_menu_open}">
      <p class="ir-nav-label">Irrigação</p>
      <nav class="ir-nav" aria-label="Navegação principal">
        <button type="button" class="ir-nav-button is-active">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M16 3v4M8 3v4M3 10h18"/></svg>
          Agendamentos
        </button>
        <a class="ir-nav-button" href="#!/1" ng-click="navigateToTab(1, $event)">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
          Novo agendamento
        </a>
        <a class="ir-nav-button" href="#!/2" ng-click="navigateToTab(2, $event)">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 7v5l3 2"/></svg>
          Histórico
        </a>
        <a class="ir-nav-button" href="#!/3" ng-click="navigateToTab(3, $event)">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 15.5A3.5 3.5 0 1 0 12 8a3.5 3.5 0 0 0 0 7.5Z"/><path d="M19.4 15a1.8 1.8 0 0 0 .36 1.98l.04.04a2 2 0 0 1-2.83 2.83l-.04-.04A1.8 1.8 0 0 0 15 19.4a1.8 1.8 0 0 0-1 .6l-.03.04a2 2 0 0 1-3.42-1.42v-.05A1.8 1.8 0 0 0 9 17.6a1.8 1.8 0 0 0-1.98.36l-.04.04a2 2 0 0 1-2.83-2.83l.04-.04A1.8 1.8 0 0 0 4.6 13a1.8 1.8 0 0 0-.6-1l-.04-.03a2 2 0 0 1 1.42-3.42h.05A1.8 1.8 0 0 0 6.4 7a1.8 1.8 0 0 0-.36-1.98L6 4.98a2 2 0 0 1 2.83-2.83l.04.04A1.8 1.8 0 0 0 11 2.6a1.8 1.8 0 0 0 1-.6l.03-.04a2 2 0 0 1 3.42 1.42v.05A1.8 1.8 0 0 0 17 4.4a1.8 1.8 0 0 0 1.98-.36l.04-.04a2 2 0 0 1 2.83 2.83l-.04.04A1.8 1.8 0 0 0 19.4 9c.2.33.4.65.6 1l.04.03a2 2 0 0 1-1.42 3.42h-.05A1.8 1.8 0 0 0 19.4 15Z"/></svg>
          Configurações
        </a>
      </nav>

      <div class="ir-next-card">
        <p class="ir-next-card-label">Próxima rega</p>
        <strong>{{ nextWateringCountdown() }}</strong>
        <span>{{ nextWateringSection() }}</span>
      </div>
    </aside>

    <main class="ir-content">
      <div class="ir-heading">
        <div>
          <p class="ir-eyebrow">Irrigação</p>
          <h1 class="ir-title">Agendamentos</h1>
          <p class="ir-subtitle">Horários configurados para ligar as seções automaticamente.</p>
        </div>
        <a class="ir-primary-button" href="#!/1" ng-click="navigateToTab(1, $event)">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
          Novo agendamento
        </a>
      </div>

      <div class="ir-stats">
        <article class="ir-stat">
          <span class="ir-stat-label">Ativos</span>
          <div class="ir-stat-value">{{ activeScheduleCount() }}<small>agendamentos</small></div>
        </article>
        <article class="ir-stat">
          <span class="ir-stat-label">Regando agora</span>
          <div class="ir-stat-value"><span class="ir-live-dot" ng-if="wateringNowCount() > 0"></span>{{ wateringNowCount() }}<small>{{ wateringNowCount() === 1 ? "válvula" : "válvulas" }}</small></div>
        </article>
        <article class="ir-stat">
          <span class="ir-stat-label">Água hoje</span>
          <div class="ir-stat-value">{{ scheduledMinutesToday() }}<small>min programados</small></div>
        </article>
        <article class="ir-stat">
          <span class="ir-stat-label">Próxima rega</span>
          <div class="ir-stat-value">{{ nextWateringTime() }}<small>{{ nextWateringShortSection() }}</small></div>
        </article>
      </div>

      <div class="ir-feedback is-error" ng-if="schedule_error">
        <span>{{ schedule_error }}</span>
        <button type="button" ng-click="dismissScheduleError()">Fechar</button>
      </div>
      <div class="ir-feedback is-loading" ng-if="editing_state.submitting">Salvando alterações...</div>
      <div class="ir-feedback is-loading" ng-if="editing_state.enabled_submitting">Atualizando liga/desliga...</div>

      <div class="ir-toolbar">
        <label class="ir-search">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m20 20-4-4"/></svg>
          <input type="search" ng-model="search_query" placeholder="Buscar seção ou horário..." aria-label="Buscar seção ou horário">
        </label>
        <div class="ir-segmented" aria-label="Filtrar agendamentos">
          <button type="button" ng-class="{'is-active': schedule_filter === 'all'}" ng-click="schedule_filter = 'all'">Todos</button>
          <button type="button" ng-class="{'is-active': schedule_filter === 'active'}" ng-click="schedule_filter = 'active'">Ativos</button>
          <button type="button" ng-class="{'is-active': schedule_filter === 'paused'}" ng-click="schedule_filter = 'paused'">Pausados</button>
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="ir-secondary-button" ng-click="toggleSort()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 7h16M7 12h10M10 17h4"/></svg>
          Ordenar
        </button>
      </div>

      <div class="ir-empty" ng-if="!schedules_loaded">
        <div>
          <svg class="ir-loading-spinner" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M20 12a8 8 0 0 0-8-8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
          <h2>Carregando agendamentos...</h2>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ir-table-wrap" ng-if="!editing_state.editing && schedules_loaded && schedules.length > 0">
        <table class="ir-table" id="table" border="0">
          <colgroup><col style="width:14%"><col style="width:11%"><col style="width:24%"><col style="width:18%"><col style="width:18%"><col style="width:15%"></colgroup>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Horário</th>
              <th>Duração</th>
              <th>Seção / válvula</th>
              <th>Dias</th>
              <th>Agendamento</th>
              <th>Ações</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr ng-repeat="schedule in visibleSchedules() track by schedule.id" ng-class="{'is-watering': sectionStatus(schedule) === 1}">
              <td data-label="Horário">
                <span class="ir-time">{{ formatScheduleTimes(schedule) }}</span>
                <span class="ir-time-note is-live" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) === 1">regando agora<span ng-if="scheduleCountdown(schedule) !== '--'"> · faltam {{ scheduleCountdown(schedule) }}</span></span>
                <span class="ir-time-note" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) !== 1">{{ scheduleDayNote(schedule) }}</span>
              </td>
              <td data-label="Duração">{{ schedule.duration_minutes }} min</td>
              <td data-label="Seção">
                <div class="ir-section">
                  <span class="ir-section-icon">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.7" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3s5 6.1 5 11a5 5 0 0 1-10 0c0-4.9 5-11 5-11Z"/></svg>
                  </span>
                  <span class="ir-section-copy"><strong>{{ sectionName(schedule) }}</strong><span>Válvula {{ schedule.valve_pin }}</span></span>
                </div>
              </td>
              <td data-label="Dias">
                <span class="ir-sr-only" data-label="Dias">{{ formatWeekdays(schedule.weekdays) }}</span>
                <span class="ir-every-day" ng-if="isEveryday(schedule.weekdays)">Todos os dias</span>
                <div class="ir-days" ng-if="!isEveryday(schedule.weekdays)">
                  <span class="ir-day" ng-repeat="weekday in weekday_options track by weekday.id" ng-class="{'is-active': isWeekdaySelected(schedule.weekdays, weekday.id)}">{{ weekday.label.charAt(0) }}</span>
                </div>
                <span class="ir-sr-only">{{ formatWeekdays(schedule.weekdays) }}</span>
              </td>
              <td data-label="Agendamento">
                <span class="ir-sr-only" ng-if="isScheduleEnabled(schedule)">Ativo</span>
                <span class="ir-sr-only" ng-if="!isScheduleEnabled(schedule)">Inativo</span>
                <span class="ir-sr-only" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) === 0">Desligada</span>
                <span class="ir-sr-only" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) === 1">Ligada</span>
                <span class="ir-status ir-status-watering" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) === 1">Regando agora<span ng-if="scheduleCountdown(schedule) !== '--'"> · {{ scheduleCountdown(schedule) }}</span></span>
                <span class="ir-status ir-status-on" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) !== 1 && isScheduleEnabled(schedule)">Ativo</span>
                <span class="ir-status ir-status-off" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) !== 1 && !isScheduleEnabled(schedule)">Inativo</span>
              </td>
              <td data-label="Ações">
                <div class="ir-row-actions">
                  <button type="button" class="ir-danger-button" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) === 1" ng-disabled="manual_pending[schedule.id]" ng-click="send({payload:turnScheduleOff(schedule)})">
                    <span>□</span>{{ manual_pending[schedule.id] === "off" ? "Desligando..." : "Desligar" }}
                  </button>
                  <label class="ir-switch" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) !== 1" title="Ativar ou pausar agendamento">
                    <input type="checkbox" ng-checked="isScheduleEnabled(schedule)" ng-disabled="editing_state.enabled_submitting" ng-click="send({payload:toggleScheduleEnabled(schedule)})">
                    <span class="ir-switch-slider"></span>
                  </label>
                  <button type="button" class="ir-icon-button" aria-label="Editar agendamento" ng-click="send({payload:sendData(schedule)})">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m4 20 4.2-1 10.6-10.6a2 2 0 0 0-2.8-2.8L5.4 16.2 4 20Z"/><path d="m14.8 6.8 2.8 2.8"/></svg>
                  </button>
                  <button type="button" class="ir-icon-button" aria-label="Mais ações" ng-click="toggleActionMenu(schedule, $event)">
                    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.7"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.7"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.7"/></svg>
                  </button>
                  <div class="ir-action-menu" ng-if="action_menu_id === schedule.id">
                    <button type="button" ng-if="sectionStatus(schedule) !== 1" ng-disabled="manual_pending[schedule.id]" ng-click="openManualDuration(schedule)">{{ manual_pending[schedule.id] === "on" ? "Ligando..." : "Ligar" }}</button>
                    <button type="button" class="is-danger" ng-click="openDeleteConfirmation(schedule)">Excluir agendamento</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      <div class="ir-empty" ng-if="!editing_state.editing && schedules_loaded && schedules.length === 0">
        <div>
          <div class="ir-empty-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3s5 6.1 5 11a5 5 0 0 1-10 0c0-4.9 5-11 5-11Z"/></svg></div>
          <h2>Nenhum agendamento cadastrado</h2>
          <p>Crie um novo horário para automatizar a irrigação de uma seção.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ir-empty" ng-if="!editing_state.editing && schedules_loaded && schedules.length > 0 && visibleSchedules().length === 0">
        <div><h2>Nenhum resultado encontrado</h2><p>Tente alterar a busca ou o filtro selecionado.</p></div>
      </div>
    </main>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="ir-modal-backdrop" ng-if="manual_state.open" ng-click="closeManualDuration()">
  <div class="ir-modal is-small" ng-click="$event.stopPropagation()">
    <p class="ir-eyebrow">Acionamento manual</p>
    <h2 class="ir-modal-title">Ligar {{ manual_state.section }}</h2>
    <p class="ir-modal-text">Confirme ou altere por quantos minutos a irrigação deve ficar ligada agora.</p>
    <div class="ir-field"><label>Tempo ligado agora (min)</label><input type="number" min="1" step="1" ng-model="manual_state.duration_minutes"></div>
    <div class="ir-modal-actions">
      <button type="button" class="ir-secondary-button" ng-click="closeManualDuration()">Cancelar</button>
      <button type="button" class="ir-primary-button" ng-disabled="!manual_state.duration_minutes || manual_state.duration_minutes < 1" ng-click="send({payload:confirmManualDuration()})">Ligar agora</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="ir-modal-backdrop" ng-if="delete_state.open" ng-click="closeDeleteConfirmation()">
  <div class="ir-modal is-small" ng-click="$event.stopPropagation()">
    <p class="ir-eyebrow">Excluir agendamento</p>
    <h2 class="ir-modal-title">Confirmar exclusão?</h2>
    <p class="ir-modal-text">O agendamento das {{ delete_state.time }} para {{ delete_state.section }} será removido. Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.</p>
    <div class="ir-modal-warning" ng-if="delete_state.running">Atenção: este agendamento está em execução agora (regando neste momento).</div>
    <div class="ir-modal-actions">
      <button type="button" class="ir-secondary-button" ng-click="closeDeleteConfirmation()">Cancelar</button>
      <button type="button" class="ir-danger-button" ng-click="send({payload:confirmDeleteSchedule()})">Excluir agendamento</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<form ng-show="editing_state.editing" class="ir-modal-backdrop" id="form-editSchedule" ng-click="cancelEdit()">
  <div class="ir-modal" ng-click="$event.stopPropagation()">
    <p class="ir-eyebrow">Edição</p>
    <h2 class="ir-modal-title">Editar agendamento</h2>
    <p class="ir-modal-text">Atualize o horário, a duração, a seção e os dias da semana.</p>
    <div class="ir-edit-grid">
      <div class="ir-field ir-field-wide">
        <div class="ir-time-field-head">
          <label>Horários</label>
          <span class="ir-time-limit">{{ schedule_form.times.length }}/3 horários</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ir-edit-times">
          <div class="ir-edit-time-card" ng-repeat="time in schedule_form.times track by $index">
            <input type="time" name="time{{$index}}" ng-model="schedule_form.times[$index]">
            <button type="button" class="ir-time-remove-button" ng-if="schedule_form.times.length > 1" ng-click="removeTime(schedule_form, $index)" aria-label="Remover horário">×</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ir-add-time-row">
          <button type="button" class="ir-add-time-button" ng-disabled="schedule_form.times.length >= 3" ng-click="addTime(schedule_form)">+ Adicionar horário</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ir-field"><label>Tempo ligado (min)</label><input type="number" min="1" name="duration_minutes" ng-model="schedule_form.duration_minutes"></div>
      <div class="ir-field ir-field-wide">
        <label>Seção / válvula</label>
        <select name="valve_pin" ng-model="schedule_form.valve_pin"><option ng-repeat="valve in valves track by valve.pin" ng-value="+valve.pin">{{ valve.section }} · Válvula {{ valve.pin }}</option></select>
      </div>
      <div class="ir-field ir-field-wide">
        <div class="ir-edit-switch">
          <div><strong>Agendamento automático</strong><span>{{ schedule_form.enabled ? "Ligado" : "Desligado" }} — controla a execução automática.</span></div>
          <label class="ir-switch"><input type="checkbox" name="enabled" ng-model="schedule_form.enabled" ng-disabled="editing_state.enabled_submitting" ng-change="send({payload:toggleEnabled(schedule_form)})"><span class="ir-switch-slider"></span></label>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ir-field ir-field-wide">
        <label>Dias da semana</label>
        <div class="ir-weekdays">
          <label class="ir-weekday"><input type="checkbox" ng-checked="isEveryday(schedule_form.weekdays)" ng-click="selectEveryday(schedule_form)"> Todos os dias</label>
          <label class="ir-weekday" ng-repeat="weekday in weekday_options track by weekday.id"><input type="checkbox" ng-checked="isWeekdaySelected(schedule_form.weekdays, weekday.id)" ng-click="toggleWeekday(schedule_form, weekday.id)"> {{ weekday.label }}</label>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ir-modal-actions">
      <button type="button" class="ir-secondary-button" ng-disabled="editing_state.submitting" ng-click="cancelEdit()">Cancelar</button>
      <button type="button" class="ir-primary-button" ng-disabled="editing_state.submitting || !hasScheduleTimes(schedule_form.times) || !schedule_form.duration_minutes || !schedule_form.valve_pin || !hasSelectedWeekday(schedule_form.weekdays)" ng-click="send({payload:editSchedule(schedule_form)})">{{ editing_state.submitting ? "Salvando..." : "Salvar alterações" }}</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</form>

<script>
(function(scope) {
  scope.schedules = scope.schedules || [];
  scope.schedules_loaded = scope.schedules_loaded || false;
  scope.valves = scope.valves || [];
  scope.weekday_options = [
    { id: "mon", label: "Seg" },
    { id: "tue", label: "Ter" },
    { id: "wed", label: "Qua" },
    { id: "thu", label: "Qui" },
    { id: "fri", label: "Sex" },
    { id: "sat", label: "Sáb" },
    { id: "sun", label: "Dom" }
  ];
  scope.schedule_form = scope.schedule_form || { id: "", times: [""], duration_minutes: "", valve_pin: "", status: "", enabled: true, weekdays: scope.weekday_options.map(function(weekday) { return weekday.id; }) };
  scope.editing_state = scope.editing_state || { editing: false, submitting: false, enabled_submitting: false };
  scope.manual_state = scope.manual_state || { open: false, schedule: null, section: "", duration_minutes: 10 };
  scope.manual_pending = scope.manual_pending || {};
  scope.manual_pending_timers = scope.manual_pending_timers || {};
  scope.manual_pending_timeout_ms = 15000;
  scope.delete_state = scope.delete_state || { open: false, schedule: null, time: "", section: "", running: false };
  scope.schedule_error = scope.schedule_error || null;
  scope.schedule_filter = scope.schedule_filter || "all";
  scope.search_query = scope.search_query || "";
  scope.sort_ascending = scope.sort_ascending !== false;
  scope.action_menu_id = scope.action_menu_id || null;
  scope.mobile_menu_open = scope.mobile_menu_open || false;
  scope.schedule_countdown_ends = scope.schedule_countdown_ends || {};
  scope.system_status = scope.system_status || { status: "reconnecting", label: "Verificando sistema" };
  scope.system_status_timeout_ms = 25000;
  scope.system_status_timer = scope.system_status_timer || null;

  scope.$watch("msg", function(msg) {
    if (!msg) return;
    if (msg.topic === "system_health") {
      scope.applySystemHealth(msg.payload);
      return;
    }
    if (msg.topic === "schedule_error" || msg.topic === "schedule_update_error" || msg.topic === "schedule_enabled_error") {
      scope.editing_state.submitting = false;
      scope.editing_state.enabled_submitting = false;
      scope.schedule_error = msg.payload || null;
      return;
    }
    if (msg.topic === "schedule_enabled") {
      scope.applyEnabledFeedback(msg.payload);
      return;
    }
    if (msg.topic === "manual_feedback") {
      scope.applyManualFeedback(msg.payload);
      return;
    }
    if (!Array.isArray(msg.payload)) return;
    if (msg.topic === "valves") {
      scope.valves = msg.payload;
      return;
    }
    scope.schedule_error = null;
    scope.schedules = msg.payload;
    scope.syncScheduleCountdowns(scope.schedules);
    scope.schedules_loaded = true;
    if (scope.editing_state.submitting) {
      scope.editing_state.submitting = false;
      scope.editing_state.editing = false;
    }
    scope.editing_state.enabled_submitting = false;
  });

  scope.navigateToTab = function(index, event) {
    var targetPath = "/" + index;
    var targetHash = "#!" + targetPath;

    if (event && event.preventDefault) event.preventDefault();
    if (typeof scope.closeMobileMenu === "function") {
      scope.closeMobileMenu();
    }

    function fallbackNavigate() {
      if (window.location.hash === targetHash) {
        if (typeof HashChangeEvent === "function") {
          window.dispatchEvent(new HashChangeEvent("hashchange"));
        } else {
          window.dispatchEvent(new Event("hashchange"));
        }
        return;
      }
      window.location.hash = targetHash;
    }

    try {
      if (window.angular) {
        var injector = window.angular.element(document.body).injector();
        if (injector) {
          var $location = injector.get("$location");
          var $rootScope = injector.get("$rootScope");
          var $route = null;
          try { $route = injector.get("$route"); } catch (ignore) {}

          $rootScope.$applyAsync(function() {
            if ($location.path() === targetPath) {
              if ($route && typeof $route.reload === "function") {
                $route.reload();
              } else {
                fallbackNavigate();
              }
              return;
            }
            $location.path(targetPath);
          });
          return;
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      fallbackNavigate();
      return;
    }

    fallbackNavigate();
  };
  scope.toggleMobileMenu = function(event) {
    if (event) event.preventDefault();
    scope.mobile_menu_open = !scope.mobile_menu_open;
  };
  scope.closeMobileMenu = function() {
    scope.mobile_menu_open = false;
  };
  scope.applySystemHealth = function(payload) {
    var status = payload && payload.status === "online" ? "online" : "offline";
    scope.system_status = {
      status: status,
      label: payload && payload.label ? payload.label : (status === "online" ? "Sistema online" : "Sistema offline"),
      last_seen_at: payload && payload.last_seen_at ? payload.last_seen_at : null,
      checked_at: payload && payload.checked_at ? payload.checked_at : null
    };
    scope.armSystemStatusTimeout();
  };
  scope.armSystemStatusTimeout = function() {
    if (scope.system_status_timer) clearTimeout(scope.system_status_timer);
    scope.system_status_timer = setTimeout(function() {
      scope.$applyAsync(function() {
        scope.system_status = { status: "offline", label: "Sistema offline", last_seen_at: scope.system_status.last_seen_at || null };
      });
    }, scope.system_status_timeout_ms);
  };
  scope.systemStatusClass = function() {
    return "is-" + ((scope.system_status && scope.system_status.status) || "reconnecting");
  };
  scope.systemStatusLabel = function() {
    return (scope.system_status && scope.system_status.label) || "Verificando sistema";
  };
  scope.systemStatusTitle = function() {
    if (!scope.system_status || !scope.system_status.last_seen_at) return "Aguardando verificação do sistema";
    return "Último heartbeat do controlador: " + scope.system_status.last_seen_at;
  };
  scope.$on("$destroy", function() {
    if (scope.system_status_timer) clearTimeout(scope.system_status_timer);
  });
  scope.findValve = function(schedule) {
    var pin = String(schedule.valve_pin || "");
    for (var i = 0; i < scope.valves.length; i += 1) {
      if (String(scope.valves[i].pin) === pin) return scope.valves[i];
    }
    return null;
  };
  scope.sectionName = function(schedule) {
    var valve = scope.findValve(schedule);
    return valve && valve.section ? valve.section : "Válvula " + schedule.valve_pin;
  };
  scope.sectionLabel = function(schedule) {
    var valve = scope.findValve(schedule);
    if (valve && valve.section) return valve.section + " (Válvula " + valve.pin + ")";
    return "Válvula " + schedule.valve_pin;
  };
  scope.normalizeWeekdays = function(values) {
    if (!Array.isArray(values)) return scope.weekday_options.map(function(weekday) { return weekday.id; });
    return scope.weekday_options.map(function(weekday) { return weekday.id; }).filter(function(id) { return values.indexOf(id) !== -1; });
  };
  scope.hasSelectedWeekday = function(values) { return scope.normalizeWeekdays(values).length > 0; };
  scope.isEveryday = function(values) { return scope.normalizeWeekdays(values).length === scope.weekday_options.length; };
  scope.isWeekdaySelected = function(values, id) { return scope.normalizeWeekdays(values).indexOf(id) !== -1; };
  scope.selectEveryday = function(form) { form.weekdays = scope.weekday_options.map(function(weekday) { return weekday.id; }); };
  scope.toggleWeekday = function(form, id) {
    var values = scope.normalizeWeekdays(form.weekdays);
    var index = values.indexOf(id);
    if (index === -1) values.push(id); else values.splice(index, 1);
    form.weekdays = scope.normalizeWeekdays(values);
  };
  scope.formatWeekdays = function(values) {
    var selected = scope.normalizeWeekdays(values);
    if (selected.length === scope.weekday_options.length) return "Todos os dias";
    if (!selected.length) return "Nenhum dia";
    return scope.weekday_options.filter(function(weekday) { return selected.indexOf(weekday.id) !== -1; }).map(function(weekday) { return weekday.label; }).join(", ");
  };
  scope.scheduleTimes = function(schedule) {
    if (schedule && Array.isArray(schedule.times) && schedule.times.length) return schedule.times;
    if (schedule && schedule.time) return String(schedule.time).split(/[|;+]/);
    return [];
  };
  scope.formatScheduleTimes = function(schedule) {
    var times = scope.scheduleTimes(schedule).filter(function(value) { return String(value || "").trim(); });
    return times.length ? times.join(", ") : "--:--";
  };
  scope.isScheduleEnabled = function(schedule) {
    if (!schedule || !Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(schedule, "enabled")) return true;
    return schedule.enabled === true || Number(schedule.enabled) === 1;
  };
  scope.sectionStatus = function(schedule) {
    if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(schedule, "status")) return null;
    return schedule.status === true || Number(schedule.status) === 1 ? 1 : 0;
  };
  scope.activeScheduleCount = function() { return scope.schedules.filter(scope.isScheduleEnabled).length; };
  scope.wateringNowCount = function() { return scope.schedules.filter(function(schedule) { return scope.sectionStatus(schedule) === 1; }).length; };
  scope.currentWeekdayId = function(date) { return ["sun", "mon", "tue", "wed", "thu", "fri", "sat"][date.getDay()]; };
  scope.scheduledMinutesToday = function() {
    var today = scope.currentWeekdayId(new Date());
    return scope.schedules.reduce(function(total, schedule) {
      return total + (scope.isScheduleEnabled(schedule) && scope.isWeekdaySelected(schedule.weekdays, today) ? (parseInt(schedule.duration_minutes, 10) || 0) : 0);
    }, 0);
  };
  scope.nextWatering = function() {
    var now = new Date();
    var candidate = null;
    scope.schedules.forEach(function(schedule) {
      if (!scope.isScheduleEnabled(schedule)) return;
      scope.scheduleTimes(schedule).forEach(function(time) {
        var parts = String(time).split(":");
        for (var offset = 0; offset <= 7; offset += 1) {
          var date = new Date(now);
          date.setDate(now.getDate() + offset);
          date.setHours(parseInt(parts[0], 10) || 0, parseInt(parts[1], 10) || 0, 0, 0);
          if (date <= now || !scope.isWeekdaySelected(schedule.weekdays, scope.currentWeekdayId(date))) continue;
          if (!candidate || date < candidate.date) candidate = { schedule: schedule, date: date, time: String(time).slice(0, 5) };
          break;
        }
      });
    });
    return candidate;
  };
  scope.nextWateringTime = function() { var next = scope.nextWatering(); return next ? next.time : "--:--"; };
  scope.nextWateringShortSection = function() { var next = scope.nextWatering(); return next ? scope.sectionName(next.schedule) : "sem previsão"; };
  scope.nextWateringSection = function() { var next = scope.nextWatering(); return next ? scope.sectionName(next.schedule) + " · " + next.time : "Nenhuma rega programada"; };
  scope.nextWateringCountdown = function() {
    var next = scope.nextWatering();
    if (!next) return "--";
    var minutes = Math.max(1, Math.round((next.date.getTime() - Date.now()) / 60000));
    var days = Math.floor(minutes / 1440);
    var hours = Math.floor((minutes % 1440) / 60);
    var mins = minutes % 60;
    if (days) return "em " + days + "d " + hours + "h";
    if (hours) return "em " + hours + "h " + mins + "min";
    return "em " + mins + "min";
  };
  scope.syncScheduleCountdowns = function(schedules) {
    var activeIds = {};
    (schedules || []).forEach(function(schedule) {
      if (!schedule || schedule.id === null || schedule.id === undefined) return;
      var key = String(schedule.id);
      activeIds[key] = true;
      if (scope.sectionStatus(schedule) !== 1) {
        delete scope.schedule_countdown_ends[key];
        return;
      }
      var remaining = Number(schedule.remaining_seconds);
      if (isFinite(remaining) && remaining >= 0) {
        scope.schedule_countdown_ends[key] = Date.now() + remaining * 1000;
      }
    });
    Object.keys(scope.schedule_countdown_ends).forEach(function(key) {
      if (!activeIds[key]) delete scope.schedule_countdown_ends[key];
    });
  };
  scope.scheduleCountdown = function(schedule) {
    if (!schedule || schedule.id === null || schedule.id === undefined) return "--";
    var endAt = scope.schedule_countdown_ends[String(schedule.id)];
    if (!endAt) return "--";
    var seconds = Math.max(0, Math.ceil((endAt - Date.now()) / 1000));
    var minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60);
    var remainder = seconds % 60;
    return minutes + ":" + String(remainder).padStart(2, "0");
  };
  scope.scheduleDayNote = function(schedule) {
    if (!scope.isScheduleEnabled(schedule)) return "pausado";
    var today = scope.currentWeekdayId(new Date());
    return scope.isWeekdaySelected(schedule.weekdays, today) ? "hoje" : "próxima execução";
  };
  scope.visibleSchedules = function() {
    var query = String(scope.search_query || "").toLowerCase().trim();
    var filtered = scope.schedules.filter(function(schedule) {
      var enabled = scope.isScheduleEnabled(schedule);
      if (scope.schedule_filter === "active" && !enabled) return false;
      if (scope.schedule_filter === "paused" && enabled) return false;
      if (!query) return true;
      return (scope.formatScheduleTimes(schedule) + " " + scope.sectionLabel(schedule)).toLowerCase().indexOf(query) !== -1;
    });
    return filtered.slice().sort(function(a, b) {
      var result = scope.formatScheduleTimes(a).localeCompare(scope.formatScheduleTimes(b));
      return scope.sort_ascending ? result : -result;
    });
  };
  scope.toggleSort = function() { scope.sort_ascending = !scope.sort_ascending; };
  scope.toggleActionMenu = function(schedule, event) {
    if (event) event.stopPropagation();
    scope.action_menu_id = scope.action_menu_id === schedule.id ? null : schedule.id;
  };

  scope.clearManualPending = function(id) {
    if (id === null || id === undefined) return;
    var key = String(id);
    if (scope.manual_pending_timers[key]) { clearTimeout(scope.manual_pending_timers[key]); delete scope.manual_pending_timers[key]; }
    delete scope.manual_pending[key];
  };
  scope.startManualPending = function(schedule, action) {
    if (!schedule || schedule.id === null || schedule.id === undefined) return;
    var key = String(schedule.id);
    scope.clearManualPending(key);
    scope.manual_pending[key] = action;
    scope.manual_pending_timers[key] = setTimeout(function() {
      if (typeof scope.$applyAsync === "function") scope.$applyAsync(function() { scope.clearManualPending(key); }); else scope.clearManualPending(key);
    }, scope.manual_pending_timeout_ms);
  };
  scope.applyManualFeedback = function(payload) {
    if (!payload || !payload.id) return;
    for (var i = 0; i < scope.schedules.length; i += 1) {
      if (String(scope.schedules[i].id) === String(payload.id)) scope.schedules[i].status = payload.action === "on" ? 1 : 0;
    }
    if (payload.action === "on") {
      var duration = Number(payload.duration_minutes);
      if (isFinite(duration) && duration > 0) scope.schedule_countdown_ends[String(payload.id)] = Date.now() + duration * 60000;
    } else {
      delete scope.schedule_countdown_ends[String(payload.id)];
    }
    scope.clearManualPending(payload.id);
  };
  scope.applyEnabledFeedback = function(payload) {
    if (!payload || !payload.id) return;
    var enabled = payload.enabled === true || Number(payload.enabled) === 1;
    for (var i = 0; i < scope.schedules.length; i += 1) {
      if (String(scope.schedules[i].id) === String(payload.id)) scope.schedules[i].enabled = enabled ? 1 : 0;
    }
    if (String(scope.schedule_form.id) === String(payload.id)) scope.schedule_form.enabled = enabled;
    scope.editing_state.enabled_submitting = false;
  };
  scope.sendId = function(id) { return { ui_action: "delete", id: id }; };
  scope.openDeleteConfirmation = function(schedule) {
    scope.action_menu_id = null;
    scope.delete_state.open = true;
    scope.delete_state.schedule = schedule;
    scope.delete_state.time = scope.formatScheduleTimes(schedule);
    scope.delete_state.section = scope.sectionLabel(schedule);
    scope.delete_state.running = scope.sectionStatus(schedule) === 1;
  };
  scope.closeDeleteConfirmation = function() {
    scope.delete_state.open = false;
    scope.delete_state.schedule = null;
    scope.delete_state.running = false;
  };
  scope.dismissScheduleError = function() { scope.schedule_error = null; };
  scope.confirmDeleteSchedule = function() {
    var schedule = scope.delete_state.schedule;
    if (!schedule) return null;
    scope.closeDeleteConfirmation();
    return scope.sendId(schedule.id);
  };
  scope.cancelEdit = function() {
    if (scope.editing_state.submitting) return;
    scope.editing_state.editing = false;
    scope.editing_state.submitting = false;
    scope.editing_state.enabled_submitting = false;
  };
  scope.toEditTimeValue = function(value) {
    if (!value) return null;
    if (value instanceof Date) return value;
    var match = String(value).match(/^(\d{2}):(\d{2})/);
    if (!match) return null;
    var date = new Date();
    date.setHours(parseInt(match[1], 10), parseInt(match[2], 10), 0, 0);
    return date;
  };
  scope.formatEditTime = function(value) {
    if (!value) return "";
    if (typeof value === "string" && /^\d{2}:\d{2}/.test(value)) return value.slice(0, 5);
    var date = value instanceof Date ? value : new Date(value);
    if (isNaN(date.getTime())) return "";
    return String(date.getHours()).padStart(2, "0") + ":" + String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
  };
  scope.toEditTimes = function(schedule) {
    var values = scope.scheduleTimes(schedule);
    return values.length ? values.map(scope.toEditTimeValue) : [null];
  };
  scope.normalizeTimes = function(values) {
    if (!Array.isArray(values)) values = [values];
    return values.map(scope.formatEditTime).filter(function(value) { return value; });
  };
  scope.hasScheduleTimes = function(values) {
    var times = scope.normalizeTimes(values);
    return times.length >= 1 && times.length <= 3;
  };
  scope.addTime = function(form) {
    if (!Array.isArray(form.times)) form.times = [null];
    if (form.times.length < 3) form.times.push(null);
  };
  scope.removeTime = function(form, index) {
    if (!Array.isArray(form.times)) form.times = [null];
    if (form.times.length > 1) form.times.splice(index, 1);
  };
  scope.sendData = function(schedule) {
    scope.schedule_error = null;
    scope.editing_state.submitting = false;
    scope.schedule_form.id = schedule.id;
    scope.schedule_form.times = scope.toEditTimes(schedule);
    scope.schedule_form.duration_minutes = parseInt(schedule.duration_minutes, 10) || null;
    scope.schedule_form.valve_pin = parseInt(schedule.valve_pin, 10) || null;
    scope.schedule_form.weekdays = scope.normalizeWeekdays(schedule.weekdays);
    scope.schedule_form.status = schedule.status;
    scope.schedule_form.enabled = scope.isScheduleEnabled(schedule);
    scope.editing_state.editing = true;
    return null;
  };
  scope.toggleEnabled = function(schedule) {
    scope.schedule_error = null;
    scope.editing_state.enabled_submitting = true;
    return { ui_action: "toggle_enabled", id: schedule.id, enabled: schedule.enabled ? 1 : 0 };
  };
  scope.toggleScheduleEnabled = function(schedule) {
    scope.schedule_error = null;
    scope.editing_state.enabled_submitting = true;
    return { ui_action: "toggle_enabled", id: schedule.id, enabled: scope.isScheduleEnabled(schedule) ? 0 : 1 };
  };
  scope.editSchedule = function(schedule) {
    scope.schedule_error = null;
    scope.editing_state.submitting = true;
    return { ui_action: "edit", id: schedule.id, times: scope.normalizeTimes(schedule.times), duration_minutes: schedule.duration_minutes, valve_pin: schedule.valve_pin, weekdays: scope.normalizeWeekdays(schedule.weekdays), status: schedule.status };
  };
  scope.openManualDuration = function(schedule) {
    scope.action_menu_id = null;
    scope.manual_state.open = true;
    scope.manual_state.schedule = schedule;
    scope.manual_state.section = scope.sectionLabel(schedule);
    scope.manual_state.duration_minutes = parseInt(schedule.duration_minutes, 10) || 10;
  };
  scope.closeManualDuration = function() { scope.manual_state.open = false; scope.manual_state.schedule = null; };
  scope.confirmManualDuration = function() {
    var schedule = scope.manual_state.schedule;
    var duration = parseInt(scope.manual_state.duration_minutes, 10);
    if (!schedule || !duration || duration < 1 || scope.manual_pending[schedule.id]) return null;
    scope.startManualPending(schedule, "on");
    scope.closeManualDuration();
    return { ui_action: "manual", action: "on", id: schedule.id, valve_pin: schedule.valve_pin, duration_minutes: duration };
  };
  scope.turnScheduleOff = function(schedule) {
    if (!schedule || scope.manual_pending[schedule.id]) return null;
    scope.startManualPending(schedule, "off");
    return { ui_action: "manual", action: "off", id: schedule.id, valve_pin: schedule.valve_pin };
  };
  if (!scope.schedule_countdown_timer) {
    scope.schedule_countdown_timer = setInterval(function() {
      if (typeof scope.$applyAsync === "function") scope.$applyAsync();
    }, 1000);
    if (typeof scope.$on === "function") {
      scope.$on("$destroy", function() {
        clearInterval(scope.schedule_countdown_timer);
        scope.schedule_countdown_timer = null;
      });
    }
  }
})(scope);
</script>

Excluir seção

Confirmar exclusão?

Excluir sensor

Confirmar exclusão?

O sensor {{ sensor_delete_state.name }} e seu snapshot atual serão removidos. Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.

Remover webhook

Confirmar remoção?

A URL será removida e todos os eventos ficarão desativados. Esta ação não afeta a irrigação.
